title: An Investigation on the Effectiveness of Horizontal Curtain Grouting Based on Multi-Method Joint Analysis: A Case Study of the Cuihongshan Iron-Polymetallic Mine
description: SpeakForWater Episode 4: An Investigation on the Effectiveness of Horizontal Curtain Grouting Based on Multi-Method Joint Analysis: A Case Study of the Cuihongshan Iron-Polymetallic Mine. A podcast conversation between Anna and Ehsan discussing the latest water resources research.
